expectations.text: Response includes or references the getMercuryStatus function
expectations.evidence: getMercuryStatus() function is explicitly named and implemented with full TypeScript signature

expectations.text: Response correctly handles whether today is in a retrograde window
expectations.evidence: Response lists 2026 periods: Mar 15-Apr 7, Jul 17-Aug 11, Nov 11-Dec 1. June 26 is not in any window; code correctly returns retrograde: false

expectations.text: Response mentions the hardcoded MERCURY_RETROGRADE array with ephemeris sources
expectations.evidence: 'This function uses a hardcoded array of retrograde periods sourced from published ephemeris data (2026-2031)'

expectations.text: Response shows the { retrograde: boolean, endDate: string | null } return shape
expectations.evidence: MercuryStatus type is explicitly shown: { retrograde: boolean, endDate: string | null }
